soundtrack_genre: Progressive House / Deep Melodic Techno (Ben Bohmer, Lane 8, ARTBAT style)

spoken_vocals.role: Absolute spatial anchor, clean mono front-center

music_stems.moog_sub_bass: Ducked dynamically to -24 dBFS during speech
music_stems.ambient_synth_pads: Wide stereo, ducked to -18 dBFS during speech, slow compressor release
music_stems.rhythmic_drums_percussion: COMPLETELY MUTED during Wayne speaking segments to eliminate sibilance clutter
music_stems.transition_risers_whips: Swell to -12 dBFS during 1-second Bezier whip-pan cuts
